title: Couple in the Woods
overview: A spooky comedy about a couple with an affinity for the paranormal, who venture to a cabin in the woods in search of a page torn from an "evil book." Legend has it that the page belonged to a deadly occultist who was trying to use it to summon a malevolent spirit. However, once they arrive, things get weird. Together, they must unfold the mystery of the page, face off against the occultist, his talking pumpkin, and the malevolent spirit before it's too late.
